hero.title: Become a Certified Emergency Medical Technician
hero.description: Prepare for Florida State and National EMT Certification with hands-on, interactive training designed for working professionals.
hero.supportText: Flexible schedules including day, night and weekend classes to fit your lifestyle.

whyStudy.title: Why Study EMT at Orlando Medical Institute?
whyStudy.description: A progressive program designed with experienced instructors and a flipped classroom to maximize your learning and readiness for emergency medical careers.

items.title: Expert Faculty
items.content: Highly qualified instructors committed to student success.

items.title: Flipped Classroom Model
items.content: Learn theory at home and practice actively in class for better understanding.

items.title: Comprehensive Curriculum
items.content: Includes simulations, clinical rotations, and real-world field experience.

items.title: Flexible Scheduling
items.content: Day, night, and weekend options to accommodate working professionals.

items.title: Certification Eligibility
items.content: Prepare to take Florida State and National EMT certification exams.

items.title: Clinical Compliance
items.text: Health, immunization and background checks ensure safe clinical experiences.

items.title: CPR Certification Included
items.text: American Heart Association CPR certification provided during the program.

items.title: Admissions Assistance
items.text: Dedicated advisors ready to guide you through application and financial aid.

items.title: Hands-On Training
items.text: Gain practical skills through labs, simulations, and field experience.

items.title: Career Readiness
items.text: Be prepared for critical decision making in emergency situations.

items.title: Flexible Learning
items.text: Flipped classroom and multiple schedule options enhance learning convenience.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your EMT Career?
